dashboard.title: Remember2Buy
dashboard.subtitle: Never forget to buy something
dashboard.monitoringStores_plural: Monitoring {{count}} stores — you'll be notified when nearby
dashboard.addStoresToStart: Add stores to start receiving alerts
dashboard.enableLocationToActivate: Enable location access to activate alerts
dashboard.moreItems: +{{count}} more items — tap to see all
dashboard.getStartedSubtitle: Add stores and shopping items to get alerts when you're nearby.

list.title: items
list.emptySubtitle: Add items you need to buy
list.freeLimitMessage: Free accounts can track up to {{limit}} items. Upgrade to Premium for unlimited items.
list.nothingToShareMessage: Add some items to your list first.
list.photoImportPremium: Photo import is a Premium feature. Upgrade to import shopping lists from photos.
list.photoImportNote: OCR processing requires a server connection. Please add items manually.
list.noItemsSubtitle: Add items above to start your shopping list.

stores.title: Stores
stores.subtitle: Monitoring {{count}} of {{total}} stores
stores.alreadyAddedMessage: {{name}} is already in your monitored stores.
stores.storeAddedMessage: You'll be reminded when you're near {{name}}.
stores.errorAdding: Failed to add store. Please try again.
stores.freeLimitMessage: Upgrade to Premium to monitor more stores.
stores.locationUnavailableMessage: Could not reach the store database. Please check your internet connection and try again.
stores.apiBusyTip: 💡 If you see this message, please tap Try Again — the store database is sometimes busy and may need a moment to respond.
stores.noSavedStoresSubtitle: Tap 'Nearby' to find stores near you
stores.permissionDenied: Location permission is required to find nearby stores.
stores.findingStoresSub: Searching up to 15 miles away. This may take 10–20 seconds — we're scanning thousands of locations to find the best matches for you.
stores.findingStoresTip: Tip: Results are cached, so future searches will be instant!
stores.locationError: Could not get your location. Please try again.
stores.networkError: Could not reach the store database. Please check your internet connection and try again.
stores.noStoresFoundDesc: Pull down to refresh or try in a different area.

coupons.title: Coupons
coupons.emptyCouponsSubtitle: Scan a barcode or import a photo to add coupons
coupons.premiumMessage: Upgrade to Premium to save unlimited coupons.
coupons.noCouponsSubtitlePremium: Scan or import coupon images to save them here.
coupons.noCouponsSubtitleFree: Upgrade to Premium to save and organize your coupons.
coupons.upsellDesc: Save and organize coupons from your camera or photo library. Upgrade to Premium to unlock.
coupons.cameraPermissionMessage: Camera access is required to scan coupons.

settings.title: Settings
settings.referFriendDesc: Give a friend 7 days free Premium
settings.referFriendMessage:
Remember to try Remember 2 Buy! 🛒
Use my code {{code}} to get 7 days free Premium.
Never forget to buy something again — it alerts you the second you arrive near a store.
Download it: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=space.manus.remember2buy

ad.headline:
NEVER feel that
"Oh no, I forgot!" moment again.
ad.subheadline: Remember2Buy alerts you the second you arrive near a store — with your exact list.
ad.feature2: Alerts when you're near a store
ad.price: For less than the cost of a bottled soda

tutorial.step1Subtitle: Build your shopping list before you leave home. Add items by name — milk, batteries, birthday card — whatever you need.
tutorial.step2Subtitle: Choose the stores you shop at. Remember2Buy finds them near you automatically — no typing addresses.
tutorial.step3Subtitle: When you drive or walk near a store, your phone buzzes with a reminder. No more driving past the store and forgetting!

notifications.title: Enable Alerts
notifications.description: Remember2Buy needs notifications to alert you when you arrive near a store. Without this, the app cannot remind you to shop.

locationFg.title: Allow Location Access
locationFg.description: Remember2Buy needs your location to detect when you're near a store.

locationBg.title: Allow 'Always' Location
locationBg.description: To alert you in the background, tap 'Allow all the time' on the next screen. This is how the app works when your phone is in your pocket.
locationBg.retriableMessage: Tap 'Try Again' and choose 'Allow all the time'

referral.title: Have a Referral Code?
referral.appliedMessage: You got 1 week of Premium free! Enjoy unlimited stores and items.
referral.invalidMessage: That referral code is invalid or has already been used.

notifications.arrivalBodyEmpty: You have items on your shopping list!
notifications.testBody: Notifications are working! You'll be alerted near stores.

budget.title: Budget & Savings
budget.noTripsSubtitle: Log a shopping trip to start tracking your spending
budget.noBudgetSubtitle: Set a weekly or monthly budget to track your spending
budget.noGoalsSubtitle: Create a goal to start saving toward something special

mealPlanner.title: Meal Planner
mealPlanner.findRecipeSubtitle: Search for any recipe and instantly add its ingredients to your shopping list
mealPlanner.noPlansSubtitle: Search for recipes and add them to your meal plan
mealPlanner.addedMessage: {{count}} ingredients from "{{name}}" added to your shopping list.
mealPlanner.addSeasonalConfirm: Add {{count}} items to your shopping list?
